title: WhenChat
description: Prepends a [HH:mm:ss] timestamp to every received chat message — never lose track of when something was sent.
body:
# WhenChat

**WhenChat** is a lightweight, client-side mod that automatically prepends a `[HH:mm:ss]` timestamp in front of every chat message you receive in Minecraft. Available for **Fabric**, **NeoForge**, and **Forge**.

Ever wondered exactly when that message in chat was sent? Whether you're on a busy multiplayer server, taking screenshots for proof, or just want a quiet reference for the time of day without opening the F3 debug menu — WhenChat has you covered.

## Features

- **Automatic timestamps** — every incoming chat message is tagged with the current time in `[HH:mm:ss]` format
- **Zero configuration** — install, launch, done
- **Client-side only** — works on any server, vanilla or modded, no server-side install needed
- **Multi-loader** — Fabric, NeoForge, and Forge JARs available for every supported MC version
- **Lightweight** — a single mixin, no performance impact
- **Subtle styling** — timestamps are rendered in gray so they don't distract from the actual message

## Example

Before:

> <Steve> hey, are you online?
> <Alex> sup

After:

> [18:42:07] <Steve> hey, are you online?
> [18:43:21] <Alex> sup

## Supported Versions

| Loader        | Minecraft versions                                                  |
| ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Fabric**    | 1.19, 1.19.1 – 1.19.4, 1.20 – 1.20.6, 1.21 – 1.21.11 (24 versions)  |
| **NeoForge**  | 1.20.6, 1.21, 1.21.1, 1.21.3, 1.21.4, 1.21.5, 1.21.8                |
| **Forge**     | 1.20.6, 1.21, 1.21.1, 1.21.3, 1.21.4, 1.21.5                        |

More MC versions and loaders coming soon!

## Requirements

- **Java 17 or newer** (Java 21 for MC 1.20.5+ and 1.21.x)
- **Fabric Loader 0.14.0+** for Fabric builds
- **NeoForge 20.6+** for NeoForge builds
- **Forge 50.0+** for Forge builds

## Dependencies

- **Fabric builds** require [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- **NeoForge** and **Forge** builds have no external dependencies

## Compatibility

WhenChat only modifies how incoming chat messages are displayed on your client. It does **not** send or intercept any data to or from the server, and is compatible with any server type (vanilla, Paper, Fabric, NeoForge, Forge, modded, etc.). No server-side install required.

## Source & Issues

Open source under the MIT license. Source code, issue tracker, and contributions welcome:
👉 [github.com/ErikEdits/WhenChat](https://github.com/ErikEdits/WhenChat)

---

If you enjoy the mod, consider leaving a thumbs up on Modrinth — it really helps!
